/usr/bin/cc -Wno-incompatible-pointer-types -std=c11 -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-O1 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now          -Wl,-z,pack-relative-relocs -flto=auto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/indicator-sound-service-bin.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/indicator-sound-service-bin.dir/main.c.o" -o indicator-sound-service  libindicator-sound-service-lib.a -lpulse-mainloop-glib -lpulse -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lgee-0.8 -lgthread-2.0 -lxml2 -lnotify -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -laccountsservice -lm -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0
